title: NOC 52113 – Audio and Video Recording Technicians | GTR Immigration
description: Audio and Video Recording Technicians (NOC 52113) are essential to Canada’s growing entertainment, film, and digital content industries. With increased demand for high-quality video production, podcasts, and streaming content, this occupation continues to expand across Canada. This role provides strong opportunities for individuals aiming to secure Canada PR through employment-based immigration pathways.

duties: Set up and operate audio and video recording equipment
employment_requirements: College diploma in audio engineering, broadcasting, or related field
salary_prospects: The outlook is strong, supported by:
Increasing demand for streaming and content platforms
labour_market_demand: Growth of film production and streaming platforms
Expansion of social media and digital content creation
Increasing need for professional audio and video production
🎬 Work in film, media, and production industries
📈 Career growth into editing and production roles
